props.ChoiceText: You struck cleanly and later learned the name had belonged to someone else all along.
props.ChoiceBio: Killing the wrong man taught you that precision is useless when the name itself is false.

0.TransitionText: Because killing the wrong man taught you that precision is useless when the name itself is false, silence, planning, and deliberate death remained your trade.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Assassin, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because killing the wrong man taught you that precision is useless when the name itself is false, blood bought you less security than you had hoped and left only hardship.

2.TransitionText: Because killing the wrong man taught you precision means little with a false name, you slipped back into the wider criminal world.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TargetText: Someone connected to the dead still remembers that the wrong name was paid for.
